## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Scope

- [ ] spec (`spec/`)
- [ ] schema (`schema/`)
- [ ] SDK (`packages/sdk-typescript`)
- [ ] CLI (`packages/cli`)
- [ ] adapters (`adapters/`)
- [ ] examples / fixtures
- [ ] docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run publish-smoke` passes if package-facing changes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test or fixture
- [ ] Schema changes are reflected in `spec/` and vice versa
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]`
